# Feature Selection

## Feature Categories

<!--
Present the rationale for grouping features into:
- Administrative / visit tracking
- Cognitive / neuropsychological tests
- Demographic / comorbidity
- Neuropsychiatric (NPI)
- Genetic / biomarker
-->

## Selection Criteria

<!--
Explain how features were selected:
- Clinical relevance based on literature
- Correlation thresholds (r > 0.15)
- Domain expertise
- Availability and completeness
-->

## Selected Feature Sets

```{python}
#| label: feature-lists

# Display the feature lists defined in your selection
# admin_features, cognitive_features, demographic_features, 
# npi_features, genetic_features
```

## Frequency Tables

```{python}
#| label: frequency-tables

# For categorical features: frequency counts per group
# For continuous features: summary statistics (mean, SD, median) per group
# Statistical tests: chi-square for categorical, t-test/Mann-Whitney for continuous
```

## Feature Importance (Preliminary)

```{python}
#| label: preliminary-importance

# Univariate analysis: which features differ most between groups
# Effect sizes (Cohen's d, Cramér's V)
```
